case_title: SHANNON COCCIMIGLIO ET AL VS. RAE PINTO ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED NOV-03-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINTO, RAE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED NOV-03-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINTO, NOEL
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT PINTO, RAE PINTO, NOEL
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PINTO, RAE PINTO, NOEL
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF COCCIMIGLIO, SHANNON COCCIMIGLIO, NICHOLAS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,027.10 FILED BY COCCIMIGLIO, SHANNON COCCIMIGLIO, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT PINTO, RAE PINTO, NOEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 21, 2015. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANTS' EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. HEARING HELD, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 BY JPT DAVID LAVINE, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COCCIMIGLIO, SHANNON COCCIMIGLIO, NICHOLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINTO, RAE PINTO, NOEL $1,866.05 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,866.05, SOME OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT DEDUCTIONS WERE FOR EXPECTED WEAR AND TEAR OVER A FOUR YEAR TENANCY AND SHOULD BE REFUNDED. THE COURT DECLINED TO DOUBLE DAMAGES OR TO AWARD ATTORNEY'S FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT PINTO, RAE PINTO, NOEL
